caption: A news broadcast segment titled "PLUS POLITICS" features a split-screen presentation. On the left, a male news anchor wearing a dark suit, white shirt, red tie, and glasses speaks while gesturing with his hands. On the right, a man wearing a red traditional cap and a patterned dark garment with pink accents is shown in a close-up shot. The background behind the anchor is a blue digital studio screen with a circular graphic and the "plus" logo. A white banner across the middle of the screen displays the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in bold black capital letters. Other on-screen text includes "PLUS POLITICS" in smaller font and social media handles such as "FOLLOW US" with icons for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, along with "PLUSTVAFRICA" and a YouTube URL. Across the sequence of frames, the anchor and the interviewee remain in their positions, with slight changes in their facial expressions and gestures as they communicate.
